TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn_Tjuku_Tsai, title = Tjuku_Tsai, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Paiwan]}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tjuku_Tsai} }

S.FORM: ti Tjuku Ing-wen Tsai (Ljinautianan: 蔡英文; pinyin: Cài Yīngwén; Pe̍h-ōe-jī: Chhoà Eng-bûn; 31 a qadaw na 8 a qiljas na 1956 a caviljan - na ), namasan cungetung nua Taiwan. pacunu uta Taiwan == kasizuan ==
S.PHON: ti ʦuku iŋ-wən tsai (ʎinautianan: ***; pinjin: ʦ*i j*ŋw*n; pə*h-*ə-j*: ʦhhu* əŋ-b*n; ** a qadaw na * a qiʎas na **** a ʦaviʎan - na ), namasan ʦuŋətuŋ nua taiwan. paʦunu uta taiwan == kasizuan ==
